india_trends.title: Domestic flows powering Indian markets despite FII exit: Gautam Trivedi
india_trends.summary: Despite foreign investor outflows, domestic investors are bolstering Indian equities, keeping benchmark indices resilient. india_trends.title: Rethinking ‘idle money’ in a rising rate environment
india_trends.summary: Indian savings accounts are evolving beyond mere transactional tools. With rising interest rates, institutions like IDFC FIRST Bank are offering higher yields, challenging the traditional view of savings accounts as low-return options. This shift encourages a more active approach to managing funds,

india_trends.title: Euro zone bond yields jump as Middle East peace deal hopes fade
india_trends.summary: Euro zone bond yields surged as hopes for a U.S.-Iran peace deal diminished, with markets now anticipating three European Central Bank interest rate hikes this year. Rising oil prices and geopolitical uncertainty contributed to a more downbeat market sentiment, while German inflation remained at 2.9

india_trends.title: Bharti Airtel Q4 preview: strong user additions but flat Arpu may temper growth
india_trends.summary: Analysts expect Airtel’s March-quarter revenue to rise on higher data usage, broadband traction and Africa growth, with investors expected to focus on dividend, capex and Airtel Africa restructuring plans.

india_trends.title: Amid PM Modi's 'no gold buy' appeal, a scheme that planned mobilisation of idle gold at homes gets spotlight
india_trends.summary: The gems and jewellery sector is urging the government to strengthen the Gold Monetisation Scheme. Industry bodies believe domestic gold mobilisation and recycling offer a better solution to foreign exchange issues. india_trends.title: OpenAI and Microsoft cap revenue-sharing payments at $38 billion ahead of possible IPO: Report
india_trends.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft have agreed to cap revenue-sharing payments at $38 billion, The Information reports, as the two companies finalise a renegotiated partnership that opens the door for OpenAI to work with Amazon and Google ahead of a possible IPO later this year.

india_trends.title: Large companies must ensure timely working capital release of MSMEs: CEA Nageswaran
india_trends.summary: Chief Economic Advisor V Anantha Nageswaran urged large companies to ensure timely payments to MSMEs to ease their working capital pressure and lower funding costs.

india_trends.title: Bitcoin slips below $81K after Trump rejects Iran peace proposal; institutional investors continue accumulating BTC
india_trends.summary: Bitcoin slipped below $81,000 after briefly crossing $82,000 as geopolitical tensions rose following US President Donald Trump’s rejection of Iran’s peace proposal. india_trends.title: Skechers-retailer Gaurik Fashions files draft papers for IPO with Sebi
india_trends.summary: Gaurik Fashions has filed draft IPO papers with Sebi to raise funds through a fresh issue of 62 lakh shares and an OFS of 8 lakh shares by Aries Opportunities Fund. The retailer, which operates stores for brands such as Skechers, Guess and Bugatti, plans to use the proceeds to expand its retail foot

india_trends.title: Customers have started committing to new product cycles: Tata Technologies MD & CEO
india_trends.summary: Tata Technologies is ramping up investments in the automotive and industrial arenas, fueled by innovative product cycles that are encouraging customer loyalty. The firm has clinched a major contract for vehicle development and anticipates an impressive double-digit revenue growth this fiscal year.

india_trends.title: PVR Inox: Higher ticket prices, food spending drive margin recovery
india_trends.summary: PVR Inox's Q4FY26 results revealed a 26% revenue growth yet shares plummeted over 6%. Strategic pricing and reduced debt are shaping the company's future, alongside a promising movie lineup.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Jyothy Labs shares tumble 15% in two days after Henkel ends Pril, Fa licence agreements
india_trends.summary: Jyothy Labs shares dropped significantly after the company revealed that licence agreements for popular dishwash brand Pril and personal care brand Fa with Henkel will end in May 2026. This marks the conclusion of a long-standing partnership. Jyothy Labs is now focusing on its own brands, particular
